name: Gingered Fig Confections
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine orange juice, liqueur and ground ginger in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to boil; add figs. Simmer, covered, for about 25 minutes, until all liquid is absorbed. Cool completely.
3. Melt chocolate with milk in the top of a double boiler.
4. Holding figs by stem, blot each with a paper towel, then dip in melted chocolate, coating completely.
5. Place on waxed paper lined baking sheet. Chill until chocolate is firm.
NOTE: These figs stay semi-soft on the outside, so to store, keep them separated.
